note: Unlocks Edit for Claude's own settings files for this session

name: TRITON_DIR
note: Triton repository path, needed for Triton integration tests and TRITON_LLVM cmake var

name: TRITON_LLVM
note: Triton's shared-library LLVM build dir, used as -DTRITON_LLVM cmake option

name: INSTRUMENTED_ROCBLAS_LIB_DIR
note: Instrumented rocBLAS library directory (monorepo build), used by all rocBLAS test suites

name: INSTRUMENTED_HIPBLASLT_LIB_DIR
note: Instrumented hipBLASLt library directory (monorepo build), used by all hipBLASLt test suites
